top3.sql:
SELECT 
    ws_item_sk,
    ws_warehouse_sk,
    AVG(ws_quantity) AS avg_quantity,
    AVG(ws_ext_sales_price) AS avg_ext_sales_price
FROM web_sales
JOIN date_dim ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE d_month_seq BETWEEN 1200 AND 1200
GROUP BY ws_item_sk, ws_warehouse_sk
ORDER BY ws_item_sk, ws_warehouse_sk
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
    ws_item_sk,
    ws_warehouse_sk,
    AVG(ws_quantity) AS avg_quantity,
    AVG(ws_ext_sales_price) AS avg_ext_sales_price
FROM web_sales
JOIN date_dim ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE d_month_seq BETWEEN 1200 AND 1200
GROUP BY ws_item_sk, ws_warehouse_sk
ORDER BY ws_item_sk, ws_warehouse_sk
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
    ws_item_sk,
    ws_warehouse_sk,
    AVG(ws_quantity) AS avg_quantity,
    AVG(ws_ext_sales_price) AS avg_ext_sales_price
FROM web_sales
JOIN date_dim ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE d_month_seq >= 1200 AND d_month_seq <= 1200
GROUP BY ws_item_sk, ws_warehouse_sk
ORDER BY ws_item_sk, ws_warehouse_sk
LIMIT 100

WHERE d_month_seq BETWEEN 1200 AND 1200
GROUP BY ws_item_sk, ws_warehouse_sk
ORDER BY ws_item_sk, ws_warehouse_sk
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
    ws_item_sk,
    ws_warehouse_sk,
    AVG(ws_quantity) AS avg_quantity,
    AVG(ws_ext_sales_price) AS avg_ext_sales_price
FROM web_sales
JOIN date_dim ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE d_month_seq BETWEEN 1200 AND 1200
GROUP BY ws_item_sk, ws_warehouse_sk
ORDER BY ws_item_sk, ws_warehouse_sk
LIMIT 100
